title: Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or any other restricted country, you know how tough it is to receive payments for your ebooks, courses, or art. PayPal holds your funds for weeks, Gumroad payouts take forever, and USDT settlements are sluggish. You need a better way to get paid, without relying on these platforms. That's where Core Shop Engine comes in – our full backend solution that automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, working seamlessly worldwide, including restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and more. With Core Shop Engine, you can sell digital products and get paid instantly, no matter where you're from or where your customers are. The future of digital commerce is here, and it's unchained.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

In simple terms, webhook-driven crypto payment fulfillment is a technology that automates the process of receiving and processing cryptocurrency payments for digital products. When a customer buys a product using USDT, for example, the transaction triggers a webhook that notifies your shop's backend, which then verifies the payment and delivers the product to the customer. It's a game-changer for creators in restricted countries who can't use traditional payment processors like PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. With this technology, you can sell digital products and get paid instantly, without relying on these platforms or waiting for weeks for payouts.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The magic happens when a customer makes a purchase using USDT or any other cryptocurrency supported by NOWPayments. The transaction triggers a webhook that sends a notification to your shop's backend, which is powered by Core Shop Engine. The backend then verifies the payment, checks for any issues, and delivers the product to the customer in the form of a PDF receipt. It's a seamless process that eliminates the need for payment processor accounts, KYC checks, and other bureaucratic hurdles. With Core Shop Engine, you can automate the entire process, from payment verification to delivery, and focus on creating more digital products.
Who This Is Built For and Why

We built Core Shop Engine for digital creators who are tired of being restricted by traditional payment processors. Whether you're an artist, writer, musician, or software developer, you deserve to get paid instantly for your work. With Core Shop Engine, you can sell digital products and receive payments in cryptocurrency, without relying on PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. It's a freedom to create and get paid on your own terms, without the hassle of bureaucratic red tape. Join the unchained commerce revolution and start selling digital products today.
Webhook-driven crypto payment fulfillment is the future of digital commerce.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Core Shop Engine is a full backend solution that integrates with NOWPayments, a cryptocurrency payment processor that supports over 300 coins. When a customer makes a purchase, the transaction is sent to NOWPayments, which verifies the payment and triggers a webhook that notifies your shop's backend. The backend, powered by Core Shop Engine, then verifies the payment and delivers the product to the customer. It's a seamless process that eliminates the need for manual intervention and ensures that payments are processed quickly and efficiently.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know how webhook-driven crypto payment fulfillment works, it's time to take action. First, sign up for Core Shop Engine and get started with setting up your shop. Choose the payment processor of your choice, configure the webhook settings, and test the process with a sample transaction. Once you're up and running, start selling digital products and getting paid instantly, without relying on traditional payment processors. With Core Shop Engine, you can unlock the full potential of your digital creations and get paid on your own terms.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
Core Shop Engine automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, working seamlessly worldwide.
